cards.title: Elastic Acquires DeductiveAI for Up to $85M
cards.body: Elastic has agreed to acquire DeductiveAI, a startup using AI to detect and resolve software bugs. The three-year-old company was backed by CRV.

cards.title: Baseten Raises $1.5B in Mega-Round
cards.body: AI inference startup Baseten is reportedly finalizing a $1.5 billion funding round at a $13 billion valuation. The raise reflects the ongoing "inference gold rush" in the industry.

cards.title: Snap Spins Off AI Video Unit Dotmo
cards.body: Snap is spinning off its AI video team into a new company called Dotmo. The move comes as Snap looks to reduce costs while accelerating AI video development.

cards.title: OpenAI Adds Talent Ahead of IPO
cards.body: OpenAI is hiring top talent including Transformer co-inventor Noam Shazeer from Google DeepMind and former Trump AI policy official Dean Ball. The moves signal preparation for the company's upcoming IPO.

cards.title: US Singles Skeptical About AI Dating
cards.body: Nearly 47% of US singles view AI negatively in dating contexts. However, many remain open to AI assistance with profile optimization and conversation starters.

cards.title: Amazon Aims to Challenge Nvidia Directly
cards.body: AWS is in talks to sell its AI chips to other data centers as it seeks to compete with Nvidia. CEO Andy Jassy has identified this as a $50 billion opportunity.

cards.title: FERC Creates Fast Lane for Data Centers
cards.body: Federal regulators have mandated that grid operators provide accelerated interconnection pathways for AI data centers. The order aims to speed deployment but doesn't address underlying electricity supply constraints.

cards.title: Karamo Brown Launches AI Wellness App Kē
cards.body: The "Queer Eye" life coach has launched Kē, a wellness app featuring his AI digital clone. The app covers fitness, nutrition, meditation, sobriety, and personal growth.

cards.title: General Intuition Seeks $300M at $2B Valuation
cards.body: General Intuition is in talks to raise $300 million to develop embodied AI and world models. The startup leverages Medal's dataset of 2 billion videos annually.

cards.title: Guardrails PAC Challenges Big Tech Spending
cards.body: A tech worker-backed PAC called Guardrails is launching a $5 million campaign funded by grassroots donations. The group positions itself as a populist counterweight to Big Tech's political influence.

cards.title: Pixi Launches Interactive AR Messaging App
cards.body: Pixi has released a new iOS app that transforms text messages into interactive augmented reality experiences. The app represents the next evolution beyond traditional emoji and GIF reactions.

cards.title: How to Disable AI in Google Docs
cards.body: Google Docs users can now disable the "Write with Gemini" AI feature that appears as pop-ups. The tutorial provides steps to turn off unwanted AI suggestions.

cards.title: Roelof Botha Joins SpaceX Board
cards.body: Former Sequoia Capital leader Roelof Botha has been appointed to SpaceX's board of directors. The appointment comes days after SpaceX completed the largest IPO ever.

cards.title: Snap's AR Glasses Fail to Impress
cards.body: Snap's long-awaited smart glasses debut, priced at premium levels, has negatively impacted the company's stock. The expensive product launch hasn't generated expected market enthusiasm.

cards.title: Enterprises Reckoning With AI ROI Challenges
cards.body: Companies are discovering the true costs of aggressive AI adoption after initial "tokenmaxxing" pushes. Uber burned through its annual AI budget in months, while others have cut Claude subscriptions.

cards.title: World Leaders Fear US AI Control Risk
cards.body: French President Macron and Indian PM Modi raised concerns at the G7 that the US could unilaterally cut off AI access. The Anthropic blackout has intensified international worries about AI dependence.

cards.title: Anthropic Joins Frontier Carbon Coalition
cards.body: Anthropic has become the first AI startup to join the Frontier coalition supporting carbon removal projects. The coalition received an additional $915 million in pledges.

cards.title: Social Platforms Enable User Algorithm Control
cards.body: Threads, Instagram, and TikTok are introducing customizable algorithm tools that give users direct influence over recommendations. The shift represents the next evolution of social media personalization.

cards.title: Elastic acquires DeductiveAI for bug-catching AI
cards.body: Elastic agreed to buy DeductiveAI, an AI startup that automatically detects and resolves software bugs, for up to $85M. The three-year-old company represents a strategic move into AI-powered debugging tools.

cards.title: Baseten raises $1.5B in AI inference mega-round
cards.body: Inference startup Baseten is closing a $1.5B funding round at a $13B valuation amid surging demand for AI model deployment. The raise reflects the growing 'inference gold rush' in AI infrastructure.

cards.title: Snap spins off Dotmo AI video company
cards.body: Snapchat is spinning off its AI video team into a new company called Dotmo to reduce costs. Current Snap staff will leave to focus exclusively on AI video development.

cards.title: OpenAI hires Transformer co-inventor before IPO
cards.body: OpenAI brought on Noam Shazeer, a Transformer co-inventor from Google DeepMind, and former Trump AI policy official Dean Ball. The moves signal major hires ahead of the company's upcoming IPO.

cards.title: Amazon AI chips challenge Nvidia's dominance
cards.body: AWS is in talks to sell its custom AI chips to other data centers, representing a potential $50B opportunity. The move positions Amazon as a direct competitor to Nvidia in the chip market.

cards.title: FERC fast-tracks AI data center grid connections
cards.body: Federal regulators directed grid operators to prioritize interconnections for AI data centers. The move aims to accelerate deployment but doesn't address underlying electricity supply shortages.

cards.title: General Intuition raises $300M for embodied AI
cards.body: General Intuition is in talks to raise $300M at a $2B valuation for its embodied AI and world models. The startup leverages Medal's dataset of 2 billion videos annually from 10 million users.

cards.title: How to disable AI in Google Docs
cards.body: Google's 'write with Gemini' AI prompts can be turned off in Google Docs settings. The guide helps users who want to disable AI writing suggestions.

cards.title: Companies hit AI ROI reckoning after overspending
cards.body: Enterprises are reassessing AI investments after experiencing budget overruns similar to Uber's AI spending blowout. Companies like Uber burned through annual AI budgets in months, forcing recalibration of AI strategies.

cards.title: World leaders fear US AI dominance as weapon
cards.body: French President Macron and Indian PM Modi raised concerns that the US could cut off AI access overnight. The Anthropic blackout incident reinforced fears about American AI dependency.

cards.title: Anthropic joins carbon removal coalition
cards.body: Anthropic became the first AI startup to join the Frontier carbon removal coalition, which received $915M in new pledges. The move aligns the AI company with climate initiatives.

cards.title: AI coding agents teach robots hardware installation
cards.body: AI coding agents successfully trained robots to install GPUs and perform precision tasks like cutting zip ties. The breakthrough demonstrates practical applications of AI in robotics and hardware assembly.

cards.title: Military AI advisor eBook explores defense AI
cards.body: MIT Technology Review published an exclusive eBook examining how militaries use AI models for decision-making. The collection includes six articles exploring AI's expanding role in military strategy.

cards.title: ALS patient becomes brain implant power user
cards.body: Casey Harrell became the first 'power user' of a brain implant enabling speech through AI decoding. The breakthrough demonstrates practical applications of neural interfaces for communication.

cards.title: South Korea's AI obsession shapes culture
cards.body: South Korea demonstrates exceptional enthusiasm for AI adoption across immigration, services, and daily life. The nation's cultural embrace of AI reflects both technological advancement and societal priorities.
